$ papercuts --help
Record workflow friction encountered while doing other work.

Usage:
  papercuts <command> [options]

Commands:
  capture  Append one papercut to a project or global log
  init     Initialize a log and optionally add AGENTS.md guidance
  version  Show the version

Options:
  -h, --help  Show help
  --version   Show the version

Run `papercuts <command> --help` for command options.

$ papercuts capture --help
Append one papercut to a project or global log. Project scope is the default.

Usage:
  papercuts capture --severity <low|medium|high> [options] <description>
  papercuts capture --severity <low|medium|high> [options] --stdin

Severity:
  low     Avoidable detour; approach and confidence remained intact
  medium  Meaningful rework, retries, workaround, changed approach, or reduced confidence
  high    Blocked work, required intervention, or credible risk of a wrong, destructive, or insecure result

Options:
  --severity <level>    Required severity: low, medium, or high
  --project             Write to ./PAPERCUTS.md (default)
  --global              Write to the global log
  --global-path <path>  Override the global log; requires --global
  --reporter <label>    Attach a reporter label
  --model <label>       Attach a model label
  --stdin               Read the complete description from standard input
  -h, --help            Show help

Environment:
  PAPERCUTS_GLOBAL_PATH  Global log override used when --global-path is absent

$ papercuts init --help
Initialize a project or global Papercuts log. Project scope is the default.

Usage:
  papercuts init [options]

Options:
  --project             Initialize ./PAPERCUTS.md (default)
  --global              Initialize the global log
  --global-path <path>  Override the global log; requires --global
  --agents              Create or update ./AGENTS.md guidance
  --no-agents           Leave AGENTS.md unchanged and do not prompt
  -h, --help            Show help

Without --agents or --no-agents, a terminal session asks before changing AGENTS.md. Non-terminal execution leaves AGENTS.md unchanged.

Environment:
  PAPERCUTS_GLOBAL_PATH  Global log override used when --global-path is absent

$ papercuts version
papercuts v0.1.0 (commit 1a2b3c4, built 2026-07-09T12:00:00Z)

# Canonical success output
Captured <severity> <project|global> papercut in <path>
Initialized <project|global> papercuts log at <path>
<project|global> papercuts log already exists at <path>
Created Papercuts guidance in <path>
Updated Papercuts guidance in <path>
Papercuts guidance is already current in <path>
Skipped AGENTS.md integration

# Canonical diagnostics
papercuts: unknown command "<command>"; run `papercuts --help`
papercuts: capture: --severity is required; choose low, medium, or high
papercuts: capture: invalid severity "<value>"; choose low, medium, or high
papercuts: capture: provide one description argument or --stdin
papercuts: capture: provide either one description argument or --stdin, not both
papercuts: capture: description is empty after trimming
papercuts: capture: --project and --global cannot be used together
papercuts: capture: --global-path requires --global
papercuts: capture: global path must be absolute: "<path>"
papercuts: capture: project log not found at "<path>"; run `papercuts init --project` in that directory
papercuts: capture: global log not found at "<path>"; run `papercuts init --global`
papercuts: capture: timed out after 5s waiting to write "<path>"
papercuts: capture: cannot append to "<path>": <operating-system error>
papercuts: capture: append to "<path>" may be incomplete; inspect the log before retrying: <operating-system error>
papercuts: init: --agents and --no-agents cannot be used together
papercuts: init: cannot use "<path>" as a log: expected a regular file, not <kind>
papercuts: init: Papercuts markers in "<path>" are malformed; log initialized at "<log-path>"; AGENTS.md unchanged
